message:
style(btree,parser,vdbe,vfs): rustfmt formatting + update golden conformance hashes

Formatting-only changes applied by rustfmt:
- fsqlite-btree cursor: line wrapping for long expressions
- fsqlite-parser expr: matches!() macro line wrapping
- fsqlite-vdbe vectorized_agg: assert_eq!() multi-line formatting
- fsqlite-vfs uring: trailing whitespace removal

Updated core_sql_golden_blake3.json conformance hashes to reflect
the logic changes from recent commits (NULL handling, planner codegen,
MVCC slot cleanup).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
